description: Style NoteAn essential for every woman's wardrobe, this checked T-shirt is a cool, wearable top to add to your collection. The soft cotton fabric keeps you comfy all day. Pair it with skinny jeans and sandals for a casual look.Product DetailsYellow, blue and pink checked T-shirt,with a mandarin collar with a split neckline, ruffles on the front, full buttoned placket, short puff sleeves, branding appliqued on the upper back and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentTurn inside out before washing and dryingDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
